summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BookMyVenue MVP platform. Backend APIs fully functional (19/19 tests passed), but frontend has critical React component errors preventing proper page rendering on dashboards.

ui_bugs.issue: React error: Select.Item must have value prop that is not an empty string - causing red error overlay on all pages
Page fails to load content properly due to React errors
Navigation to Users/Venues pages not working properly
Page fails to load due to React component errors

integration_issues.issue: Role-based dashboard pages showing React errors preventing full functionality

passed_tests: Authentication for all roles (admin, RM, venue owner)
Landing page loads and hero search works
Venue owner dashboard and create venue form
Public venue search and details APIs
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix React Select component errors causing 'value prop must not be empty string' errors across all pages. This is preventing dashboards from loading properly and causing red error overlays. Also fix ESLint warnings about missing useEffect dependencies.
